commands.review_summary:
The PR preserves the cumulative repository `CHANGELOG.md` while adding a prepack/postpack helper that temporarily packages only the release section matching `package.json` version, plus focused tests.

PR surface: Tests +166, Config +1, Other +142. Total +309 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a release-packaging feature PR rather than a bug report. The changed behavior is covered by the helper tests and the PR body's dry-run package proof.

target.title: feat: only include the current changelog section in tarball
target.body:
## Summary

- Keep the repository `CHANGELOG.md` cumulative, including `Unreleased`, and package only the relevant release section during npm prepack.
- Add a `scripts/package-changelog.mjs` helper that backs up the source changelog, selects the package version's exact stable/correction/prerelease section, falls back from prerelease to stable and then `Unreleased`, and restores the source changelog on `postpack` or the next prepack.
- Cover stable, correction, alpha/beta, fallback, missing-section, and prepare/restore behavior in focused tests.

## Verification

- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 scripts/package-changelog.mjs scripts/openclaw-prepack.ts test/scripts/package-changelog.test.ts package.json && node --check scripts/package-changelog.mjs && node --check scripts/openclaw-prepack.ts && git diff --check`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/package-changelog.test.ts` (`1 passed`, `7 passed`)
- Dry-run package proof:
  - `node scripts/package-changelog.mjs prepare`
  - `npm pack --dry-run --json --ignore-scripts`
  - verified packed `CHANGELOG.md` entry size: `6414`, `entryCount`: `798`, `packageSize`: `2198753`, `unpackedSize`: `7533506`
  - verified the temporary packaged changelog contained `## 2026.5.28`, did not contain `## Unreleased`, and did not contain `## 2026.5.27`
  - `node scripts/package-changelog.mjs restore`
  - verified source `CHANGELOG.md` restored to `sha256=7abb77d14941d7c1b542d1a04f2010dbd91eeb2826849585c6afbb05e9c96c62`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt "Review this OpenClaw packaging change. The source CHANGELOG.md must remain cumulative in the repository, but npm prepack should temporarily replace it with only the package version's relevant release section and postpack should restore the original. Check release-channel behavior for stable, correction, beta, and alpha versions, restore behavior on interrupted packs, and package lifecycle ordering."` (`autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`)

Replaces the earlier per-version source changelog approach in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88097.
target.author: romneyda
